title: AnimatedContainer
description: Animate a container's size and color when a variable changes.
problemStatement:
Implicit animations are easy! Use `AnimatedContainer` with a `duration` of 500ms. Change its `width` from `100` to `200` when a boolean `_expanded` is true.

**Requirement:** Trigger the change with a `GestureDetector` tap.
hints: Just update the variable inside `setState` and Flutter handles the rest!
expectedOutput: The box smoothly grows when tapped.
